articles.author: Gordon Gottsegen, Christine Idzelis, Tomi Kilgore, Jamie Chisholm, Steve Goldstein
articles.title: Stock Market Today: Dow falls back below 50,000, S&P 500 and Nasdaq slip after hitting record highs; investors watch oil prices in hopes of end to Iran war - MarketWatch
articles.description: The U.S. stock-market indexes were lower on Thursday, as investors watched for Iran's response to the U.S. proposal for peace and shares of Big Tech companies attempted to hold onto their gains

articles.author: Aisha Malik
articles.title: Google unveils Whoop-like screenless Fitbit Air - TechCrunch
articles.description: The device comes with health and fitness tracking like 24/7 heart rate, heart rhythm monitoring with A-fib alerts, SpO2, resting heart rate, heart rate variability, sleep stages and duration, and more.
articles.content: Google on Thursday unveiled its new Fitbit Air, a Whoop-like screenless wearable that retails for $100. The device includes health and fitness tracking features like 24/7 heart rate monitoring, heart… [+2207 chars]
